prompt:
Ultra-realistic SAME Korean girl identity in every image — silky black hair, glossy eyes, natural blush makeup, realistic skin texture, youthful Korean beauty aesthetic.
Generate random cinematic lifestyle photos in different beautiful outdoor locations — vibrant happiness vibe, carefree energy, candid enjoying moments, luxury Instagram editorial feel.
Locations:
night street with neon lights, tropical beach sunset, rooftop city view, flower garden, rainy café street, amusement park, glowing festival lights.
Different poses in every image:
laughing naturally, running playfully, hair blowing in wind, candid smile, looking back at camera, sitting relaxed, enjoying music, dancing lightly.
Each image must have a DIFFERENT eye-catching outfit color:
electric blue, cherry red, lavender purple, emerald green, pure white, hot pink, matte black.
Style:
cinematic DSLR photography, realistic human beauty, warm glow lighting, dreamy bokeh, soft motion blur, ultra detailed, vibrant colors, rich contrast, aesthetic Korean fashion vibe, natural joyful emotions, premium lifestyle photography, NOT fake AI look.
1:1 aspect ratio.
